channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistan, Egypt and Turkiye Facilitate Back-Channel Talks to De-escalate US-Iran Conflict
item.description: According to an official source speaking to Dawn, Pakistan is working closely with Egypt and Turkiye in active back-channel diplomacy to reduce tensions between the United States and Iran. This involv...

item.title: Trump delays strikes on Iran amid hopes for peace talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump has delayed planned airstrikes on Iran’s energy and power infrastructure for five days, saying that discussions between the two nations aimed at ending their 24-day war were ...

item.title: Trump visits Graceland after Memphis event and expresses admiration for Elvis Presley
item.description: Donald Trump visited Elvis Presley’s Graceland estate in Memphis, Tennessee, following a law enforcement roundtable held in the city. During the visit, Trump openly expressed his admiration for the ic...

item.title: Kenya Airways load factor jumps to nearly 100% as Middle East war diverts passengers from Europe, US and Asia routes
item.description: Kenya Airways has seen a sharp increase in passenger demand for its flights following the ongoing war in the Middle East involving the US, Israel and Iran. The national carrier reported that its load ...

item.title: Election Commission clarifies BJP seal appeared on letter due to clerical error
item.description: The Election Commission of India has clarified that a letter circulated with a Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) seal was due to a clerical oversight. The incident involved a document submitted by the BJP ...

item.title: Trump Delays Strikes on Iran for Five Days Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: On the 24th day of the US-Israeli war against Iran, President Donald Trump has deferred planned strikes on Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure for five days. This tactical pause extends the ...

item.title: Assam 2026 Assembly Election: Gaurav Gogoi's prospects in Jorhat
item.description: The upcoming Assam Assembly Election 2026 is drawing attention to political legacies and local leadership, particularly in Jorhat, where Gaurav Gogoi, the son of former Congress leader Tarun Gogoi, is...

item.title: Rideshare Companies Increase Fares to Support Drivers Amid Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: Rideshare and delivery companies in Australia, including Uber and DiDi, have raised fares and introduced surcharges in response to rising fuel prices caused by the Middle East conflict. Uber announced...

item.title: Tanzania strengthens fuel supply monitoring amid global energy instability
item.description: The Energy Minister of Tanzania, Deogratius Ndejembi, has directed the Energy and Water Utilities Regulatory Authority (EWURA) to carry out rigorous inspections of all fuel storage facilities in the c...

item.title: Markets lower expectations for Bank of Canada rate hikes following US-Iran talks
item.description: Short-term bond yields in both Canada and the U.S. dropped sharply on Monday, reversing gains from Friday, after U.S. President Donald Trump announced he was halting planned strikes on Iranian energy ...

item.title: Conflicting Reports Over Missile Attack on Diego Garcia US-UK Base
item.description: Reports emerged on March 23, 2026, that a joint US-UK military base on Diego Garcia in the Indian Ocean came under attack from two long-range missiles, each reportedly capable of travelling up to 4,00...

item.title: Congress criticises PM Modi’s Lok Sabha speech on West Asia conflict, raises concerns over US stance and farmer impact
item.description: Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi strongly criticised Prime Minister Narendra Modi over his recent Lok Sabha speech on the ongoing West Asia conflict, alleging that the Prime Minister avoided mentioni...

item.title: Sofia Andres shares insights on preparing for her role as Claudia in “The Alibi”
item.description: Ibinahagi ni Sofia Andres ang kanyang karanasan at mga pinagdaanang hamon sa pagganap bilang Claudia sa seryeng “The Alibi.” Ayon sa aktres, hindi naging madali ang pagpasok sa karakter dahil nanganga...

item.title: Families demand accountability following deaths linked to hospital failures in Gauteng
item.description: Two Gauteng families are calling for justice after the Health Ombud's report exposed severe failings at Netcare Femina and Dr George Mukhari Academic Hospital, which led to the deaths of a newborn and...

item.title: Trump postpones planned strikes on Iranian power plants amid ongoing talks
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has signalled a possible de-escalation in tensions with Iran, announcing that the US and Iran have engaged in productive talks over the past two days aimed at a comple...

item.title: Police seek suspects after fatal shooting of attorney in Johannesburg CBD
item.description: Police in Johannesburg have launched an urgent manhunt after a 35-year-old female attorney was shot and killed in the city’s central business district on Monday morning. The incident occurred at the i...

item.title: Missing Persons Crisis in Gaza Leaves Families in Legal and Financial Limbo
item.description: The article examines the growing legal and humanitarian crisis in Gaza caused by the inability of thousands of families to obtain death certificates for missing relatives. Since October 2023, widespre...

item.title: Air Peace Responds to Tax Evasion Allegations, Proposes Dialogue with Lagos Government
item.description: Air Peace, one of Nigeria’s biggest airlines, don scatter, reacting to reports wey say dem and their Chairman, Allen Onyema, and Vice Chairman, Alice Onyema, face court case for allegedly dodging tax....

item.title: Review: Virginia Gay’s Lesbian Adaptation of Cyrano Struggles to Find Its Voice
item.description: Virginia Gay’s North American premiere of Cyrano, a lesbian adaptation of Edmond Rostand’s 1897 play, presents an intriguing concept that ultimately struggles in execution. Set at the CAA Theatre in T...

item.title: Federal government leaves work-from-home decisions up to Australians amid global fuel supply worries
item.description: Australia’s federal government has said that it will not be issuing any nationwide directive for people to work from home, despite mounting international concern over fuel supply disruptions linked to...
